title: The First Step: Find Your Why
description: An onboarding reflection journey where new guild members uncover the motivation that will guide every future challenge.
openingSituation: You arrive at the Compass Dais, where four halls surround you. Each hall asks you to face a different part of yourself before you can name your reason for moving forward.

compass_dais.name: Compass Dais
compass_dais.description: A circular platform with four radiant paths. You can choose any hall in any order.

hall_memory.name: Hall of Memory
hall_memory.description: Echoes of your past speak here. Choose what still shapes your steps.

hall_ambition.name: Hall of Ambition
hall_ambition.description: Visions of tomorrow sharpen into intent. Choose what you are willing to chase.

hall_burden.name: Hall of Burden
hall_burden.description: This chamber reveals weight carried in silence. Choose what you are still carrying.

hall_connection.name: Hall of Connection
hall_connection.description: Threads of purpose bind you to others. Choose who you move forward for.

hall_memory.question: What part of your past still guides you?

hall_ambition.question: What do you want badly enough to chase?

hall_connection.question: Who do you move forward for?

final.question: What is your why?
options: To become someone my younger self would trust.
To build a life that uplifts others.
To turn my pain into purpose.
